arts.ttl: Harry Maguire recovers from Erik ten Hag's biggest clanger to set Man Utd example
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has emerged as a key defender under Ruben Amorim after Erik ten Hag tried to force him out of Manchester United, with the defender expected to play a big part under his new boss

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: ‘MAJOR TWIST’ warning over Odegaard 2.0 as Arsenal and Chelsea plot hijack
arts.sum: As far back as September, Nypan was seen as an important January transfer target for the Red Devils, yet Ruben Amorim’s side have delayed over a deal and face the possibility of being beaten to the wonderkid by both Arsenal and Chelsea, according to GMS . Man Utd believe that they will be able to sign the teen if they bid around €17.8 million (£15m), which would make the Rosenborg starlet the second-most expensive player to come out of Norway behind only John Obi Mikel, who controversially moved to Chelsea and not Old Trafford in 2006 for €20m.

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed nightmare January transfer window blow as Marcus Rashford move 'blocked'
arts.sum: Man United are back in action on Thursday as Ruben Amorim's team look to build more positive momentum with a win over relegation strugglers Southampton
